dragon_breath.title: Collect Dragon Breath from the Ender Dragon's acid clouds (right-click with glass bottles)

void_statement.title: Look into the void from the edge of an outer island — hold for five seconds

subtitle.text: The void does not forget. It simply cannot tell you what it knows.

description: The dragon is dead. The portal is open.
You are standing in the End and none of the things that were supposed to stop you
Every civilization that came before you entered this space.
The Oldest Civilization. The Corrupted. The Cryptic. The Cold.
All of them reached the End. All of them fell before Ch14.
You are the first inheritor to reach this chapter.
That is not a metaphor. That is the design of the modpack.
Dragon Breath is collected by right-clicking acid cloud particles with glass bottles.
Hold the bottle in the cloud before it dissipates.
You need 4 bottles minimum for lingering potions and End's Delight recipes.
→ Look into the void (the real one) [check]
